Document:
# Super Mutants
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Super_Mutants"]
Humans exposed to Forced Evolutionary Virus (FEV). Transformed into massive green-skinned creatures with immense physical power and near-total radiation immunity. Most lost higher cognitive function. Some retained intelligence.
## Physical Characteristics
[bold]1.5x human scale[/bold] — towering over normal humans
[bold]Extreme physical strength[/bold] and resilience
[bold]Near-total radiation immunity[/bold]
[bold]Greatly extended lifespan[/bold] — centuries, no confirmed upper limit
Skin ranges from olive green to deep yellow-green
## Roles
All Super Mutant roles require [bold][color=#cc3333]whitelist[/color][/bold] and are locked to the Super Mutant species.
[bold][color=#669933]Super Mutant[/color][/bold] FEV-mutated human. Your size is both advantage and curse — feared by most, trusted by few. How you use your strength defines what you are.
[bold][color=#cc3333]Super Mutant Gladiator[/color][/bold] Combat is your purpose. Arena-tested, wasteland-hardened. Always looking for the next worthy challenge.
## Faction Relations
[bold][color=#a4885c]Faction[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Standing[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Notes[/color][/bold]
Brotherhood of Steel
[bold][color=#cc3333]Kill on Sight[/color][/bold]
Classified as Biological Abominations. No exceptions.
NCR
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Treated as hostile wildlife.
Caesar's Legion
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Too dangerous to enslave, too proud to submit.
Townsfolk
[color=#ffb000]Fearful[/color]
Clears the street. Trust takes time.
Wastelanders
[color=#a4885c]Variable[/color]
Some trade, some run, some shoot first.
Other Super Mutants
Neutral
Shared blood does not mean shared purpose.
